title: Mind Erosion
description:
一款以心理恐怖为核心的 Minecraft 模组
A Minecraft mod centered around psychological horror
body:
「虚噬」 是一款以心理恐怖为核心的 Minecraft 模组，主打独特的 Mimic（仿像实体） 机制，为玩家带来沉浸式的恐怖体验。模组摒弃了传统的战斗与生存玩法，转而通过 环境干扰、心理暗示和不可预测的事件 营造紧张氛围，让玩家在熟悉的世界中感受到未知的恐惧。

核心机制与特色

1. Mimic（仿像实体）
◦ 该实体不会主动攻击玩家，而是通过 诡异的行为模式 制造心理压迫感。
◦ 当玩家靠近时，Mimic 会 突然消失，并在原地留下带有神秘文字的告示牌（如 "wait for my return..."）。
◦ 多次遭遇后，Mimic 的行为会逐渐升级，甚至可能 篡改游戏机制（如干扰合成配方）。
   
2. 环境干扰
◦ 玩家可能会遭遇 TNT 陷阱 或 突如其来的推力（如被推下悬崖），增强不可预测性。
◦ 游戏内会随机出现 合成配方异常，短暂改变合成表，让玩家怀疑自己的记忆。
   
3. 心理暗示
◦ 通过 日志警告、闪烁的 UI 或虚假音效 暗示玩家的游戏世界正在被某种存在侵蚀。
◦ 实体生成时没有明显音效，而是依赖 视觉诡计（如突然出现在玩家身后）。
   
4. 轻量级设计
◦ 无需额外维度或复杂机制，所有恐怖元素都基于原版 Minecraft 的玩法改造，兼容性优秀。
◦ 适合整合包制作者或希望在不改变游戏框架的情况下增强恐怖氛围的玩家。
   
适用场景
• 单人恐怖挑战：适合喜欢心理恐怖、追求沉浸感的玩家。
• 服务器整蛊：管理员可手动召唤 Mimic 来惊吓其他玩家。
• 整合包搭配：可与「惊变100天」或「SCP 模组」结合，增强生存模式的压迫感。

「虚噬」 并非依赖血腥或 jump scare，而是通过 心理暗示和环境异变 让玩家在熟悉的世界中感到不安，适合喜欢慢热型恐怖的 Minecraft 玩家。

"Mind Erosion" is a psychological horror-themed Minecraft mod centered around a unique Mimic entity, designed to deliver an immersive and unsettling experience. Rather than relying on traditional combat or survival mechanics, this mod creates tension through environmental disturbances, psychological manipulation, and unpredictable events, making even familiar surroundings feel unnerving.
Core Features & Mechanics

1. The Mimic Entity
◦ Unlike typical hostile mobs, the Mimic does not attack directly. Instead, it employs uncanny behavior to unsettle players.
◦ When approached, it vanishes abruptly, leaving behind mysterious signs with eerie messages (e.g., "wait for my return...").
◦ After multiple encounters, its actions escalate—disrupting crafting recipes or altering minor game mechanics.
   
2. Environmental Tricks
◦ Players may stumble upon randomly placed TNT traps or experience unexplained forces(e.g., being pushed off cliffs).
◦ Crafting recipes may temporarily glitch, making players question their memory of the game.
   
3. Psychological Manipulation
◦ Subtle log warnings, UI flickers, or phantom sounds imply that the game world is being corrupted by an unseen presence.
◦ The Mimic lacks spawn sounds, relying on visual deception (e.g., appearing silently behind the player).
   
4. Lightweight & Compatible
◦ No custom dimensions or complex systems—horror elements are seamlessly integrated into vanilla mechanics.
◦ Ideal for modpacks or players seeking horror without drastic gameplay overhauls.
Recommended Use Cases
   
• Solo Horror Playthroughs: Perfect for players who enjoy slow-burn psychological tension.
• Server Pranks: Admins can manually spawn Mimics to unsettle others.
• Modpack Integration: Pairs well with mods like "100 Days Zombie Apocalypse" or "SCP Foundation" to amplify survival horror.

"Mind Erosion" avoids cheap jump scares, instead using psychological tricks and environmental anomalies to make players feel watched and uneasy. Ideal for those who prefer atmospheric horror over gore or shock tactics.
